subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast in the Covenant! Praise be to God that ye have sought after truth and have illumined the chamber of your heart with the light of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان الحمد لله تحری حقیقت نمودید و سراچه دل را بنور هدایت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @business; financial; property matters, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
